---
title: "Presentation Title"
subtitle: "Short subtitle or event name"
author: "Helga Ingimundardóttir"
institute: "University of Iceland"
presenter:
  name: "Helga Ingimundardóttir"
  position: "Assistant Professor"
  department: "Industrial Engineering"
  office: "VR2-254a"
  username: "helgaingim"
  github: "tungufoss"
  orcid: "0000-0002-2780-3546"
date: today
format:
  revealjs:
    title-slide: false
    slide-number: true
    show-slide-number: all
    controls: true
    progress: true
    incremental: false
    transition: fade
    background-transition: fade
    width: 1600
    height: 900
    center: false
    css: styles.css
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.align = "center",
  fig.retina = 2,
  out.width = "85%"
)
```

{{< include slides.qmd >}}
